## Summary / 概述

Describe the change and the user-facing impact.

请说明本次改动及其对用户的影响。

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] I kept private student data, credentials, and generated personal briefs out of the repository.
- [ ] I updated bilingual reader-facing documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when applicable.
- [ ] I ran local checks or explained why they are not applicable.

- [ ] 我没有提交学生隐私、凭据或已生成的个人晨报。
- [ ] 行为变化时，我已同步更新中英文读者文档。
- [ ] 适用时，我已新增或更新测试。
- [ ] 我已执行本地检查，或说明为什么不适用。

## Test results / 测试结果

Paste relevant command output or explain why testing is not applicable.

粘贴相关命令输出，或说明为什么不适用测试。
